summary: Piccadilly disruption may affect Liverpool Street: Part Closure. PICCADILLY LINE: Saturday 6 June, from 0045, and all day Sunday 7 June, no service between Hammersmith and Heathrow (All Terminals) / Uxbridge, including Friday and Saturday Night Tube. Use METROPOLITAN LINE services between Rayners Lane and Uxbridge.

status.reason: PICCADILLY LINE: Saturday 6 June, from 0045, and all day Sunday 7 June, no service between Hammersmith and Heathrow (All Terminals) / Uxbridge, including Friday and Saturday Night Tube. Use METROPOLITAN LINE services between Rayners Lane and Uxbridge.

disruption.description: PICCADILLY LINE: Saturday 6 June, from 0045, and all day Sunday 7 June, no service between Hammersmith and Heathrow (All Terminals) / Uxbridge, including Friday and Saturday Night Tube. Use METROPOLITAN LINE services between Rayners Lane and Uxbridge.
disruption.additionalInfo: Replacement buses operateService PL1: (Day and Night Service): Hammersmith - Turnham Green (Chiswick High Road) - Chiswick Park (not night journeys) - Gunnersbury (not night journeys) - Acton Town - Ealing Common - Ealing Broadway - South Ealing - Northfields - Boston Manor - Osterley;Service PL3: (Day Service): Hammersmith - Heathrow Terminal 2 Bus Station (for Heathrow Terminals 2 and 3, and rail connections to Heathrow Terminals 4 and 5);Service PL4: (Day Service): Gunnersbury - Acton Town - Ealing Common - North Ealing - Hanger Lane (for Central line and Park Royal) - Alperton (Bridgewater Road) - Sudbury Town (Whitton Avenue East) - Sudbury Hill - South Harrow - Rayners Lane;Service PL7: (Day and Night Service): Hammersmith - Osterley - Hounslow East - Hounslow Central (Bell Corner) - Hounslow West - Hatton Cross - Heathrow Terminal 2 Bus Station (for Heathrow Terminals 2 and 3) - Heathrow Terminal 5;
